mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article_tag ORDER BY article_count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(article_count), 0) AS totalUsage, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(article_count)), 0) AS avgUsage, (SELECT name FROM article_tag ORDER BY article_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS hotTagName, (SELECT article_count FROM article_tag ORDER BY article_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS hotTagCount FROM article_tag
SELECT id, name, slug, description, color, article_count, category_id FROM article_tag WHERE (status IS NULL OR status = '1') ORDER BY article_count DESC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
